title: 5 traits God looks for before He promotes a man
caption:
Not every man rises.

The ones who do have something specific in common — and Scripture names it before they ever see their first promotion.

It's not the hustle. It's not the talent. What God looks for in a man before He moves him up is a lot simpler — and a lot harder.

Five traits of the man God promotes:

1. He credits God out loud — in the room where it might cost him.
2. He listens to older men — and lets them in.
3. He takes the rebuke — can be corrected without going cold.
4. He stays the same — success doesn't change how he treats people.
5. He kneels last — takes the win back to God before he takes the bow.

"Humble yourselves before the Lord, and he will exalt you." — James 4:10

—
